assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-21 contain '## Repository Registry' followed by a table with headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and the separator row '|---|---|---|---|' with no data rows after it.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 23-27 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', and '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 29-35 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and '### Limitations' with 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 (lines 13-20) lists MCP tools examined (Built-in and GitHub tools), states the Serena tool pattern looked for, and concludes '**Serena instances found**: None'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 3.1 (line 24) states 'No tools prefixed with mcp__atlassian__ found. Atlassian MCP is unavailable.' Step 3.2 (line 25) states 'User chose option 2 (manual entry, skip auto-discovery).' Step 3.4 (lines 26-30) lists the manual entry values provided.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2, line 19 states '**User decision**: Continue without code intelligence', indicating the user was prompted about whether to continue without code intelligence or set up Serena.
